name: my-diary-workspace
description: Root workspace for My Diary project

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && uv sync
scripts.db: (docker-compose up -d postgres 2>/dev/null || docker compose up -d postgres 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ Docker not found/running, falling back to local SQLite...')
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn my_diary.api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --reload
scripts.dev: npm run db && concurrently -n "DB,API,WEB" -c "magenta,blue,green" "echo 'Ensuring environment is ready...'" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.dev:cloud: concurrently -n "PROXY,API,WEB" -c "cyan,blue,green" "npm run proxy" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
